text.title: Hourly-to-Fixed Transition Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a transition plan. Subagent must satisfy this before returning a recommendation.

field.name: overlap_window
field.constraint: hourly_clients_retained_count between 2 and 3 AND duration_weeks between 8 and 12

forbidden.pattern: action_enum values outside the closed set
pilot_client is the lowest-margin or newest client (violates r1)
more than 1 productized_sku in the same quarter (violates r3)
reprice_round.communication_window_days > 14 OR multiple non-overlapping windows (violates r4)
scope_definition or deliverables marked "TBD" / "to be discussed"

allowed-transformations.transformation: Convert action "retain_hourly" to "sunset" if client refuses reprice round (no operator override needed).
Extend overlap_window.duration_weeks up to 16 if cash_bridge.weeks_covered >= 10.
Add ONE optional second productized_sku only after first SKU has 3 paying customers.

list.item: Audit table has every active client with margin computed
Pilot client is the highest-margin existing client
Overlap window keeps 2-3 hourly clients during pilot
Exactly ONE productized SKU in the plan
Re-price round is single communication window ≤ 14 days
Cash bridge covers ≥ 6 weeks at current burn
SKU deliverables and exclusions are concrete (no TBDs)
